introSection: Snoopy's Flying Ace Adventure (Japanese: スヌーピーのフライング・エース・アドベンチャー) is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch firm Vekoma currently located at Universal Studios Japan in Konohana-ku, Osaka, Japan. The roller coaster replaced Snoopy's Great Race.
fullText: Snoopy's Flying Ace Adventure (Japanese: スヌーピーのフライング・エース・アドベンチャー) is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch firm Vekoma currently located at Universal Studios Japan in Konohana-ku, Osaka, Japan. The roller coaster replaced Snoopy's Great Race.
